description_long: This is a male American football player in full gear, including a helmet with a faceguard, shoulder pads, a fitted jersey with the number 19, padded pants, and knee-high athletic socks. He is captured in a dynamic, mid-air pose, as if leaping or dodging, with one arm extended outward and the other securely holding a football. The uniform is tight-fitting and designed for protection and mobility, with visible padding at the shoulders, thighs, and knees. The helmet covers the entire head, leaving only the face partially visible through the facemask. His footwear consists of cleated athletic shoes, suitable for traction on grass or turf. The overall appearance is that of a professional or collegiate athlete actively engaged in a game or practice.
description: A male football player in full protective gear leaps dynamically, gripping a football and extending one arm outward. He wears a helmet, padded uniform, and cleated shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the player's faceguard, extended left arm, and football held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent left knee, muscular arm, and the football cradled against the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, jersey number 19, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right arm holding the football and the forward-driving motion of the left leg.
attribute_clothing_type: American football uniform with helmet, shoulder pads, padded jersey, and athletic pants
attribute_posture: leaping with one knee raised and one arm extended outward
